### 2141129
**Care Bears: Unlock the Magic S01E20 - The Big Rumble**  
🆕 TV-Y7 🔓 11:01  
⌛ May 13, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=10000000000&titleid=2141129&mediaid=99461e418f0d51ee521b3375d03d1a10a9d8ec8c) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/care-bears-unlock-the-magic/the-big-rumble-episode.html  
seriesid=`2141109` titleid=`2141129` mediaid=`99461e418f0d51ee521b3375d03d1a10a9d8ec8c`  
_A family of comically raucous rocks moves in near a Whiffle garden and drives them to distraction with their ground-pounding games. Funshine gets the rocks to leave. But when he learns their ground-pounding creates new soil, he must convince them to come back._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141129_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>

_It's time to grow the best flowers in Glitterwood forest! But Unica and the bears soon realize that they're all thumbs, and none of them are green!
